stemHtml: The MLS frequencies and available channels are...

options.a: in the SHF band for the MLS elements and the VHF band for the DME, 100 available channels.
options.b: in the VHF- and UHF band, 40 available channels.
options.c: in the range 5060 – 5090 MHz, 200 kHz separation giving 150 available channels.
options.d: in the SHF band, 300 kHz frequency separation giving 200 available channels.
